inputs.label: Staked Amount
inputs.businessContext: The initial amount of cryptocurrency staked.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial amount of cryptocurrency staked.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stake edilen kripto paranın başlangıç miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfängliche Betrag der gestaketen Kryptowährung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant initial de cryptomonnaie mis en jeu.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad inicial de criptomoneda apostada.

inputs.label: Annual Percentage Yield (APY)
inputs.businessContext: The annual yield offered by the staking protocol, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The annual yield offered by the staking protocol, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Staking protokolü tarafından sunulan yıllık getiri, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die vom Staking-Protokoll angebotene jährliche Rendite, ausgedrückt als Prozentsatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le rendement annuel offert par le protocole de staking, exprimé en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: El rendimiento anual ofrecido por el protocolo de staking, expresado como porcentaje.

inputs.label: Staking Duration
inputs.businessContext: The period over which the tokens are staked, in days.

businessContext_i18n.en: The period over which the tokens are staked, in days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Token'ların stake edildiği süre, gün cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zeitraum, über den die Token gestakt werden, in Tagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La période pendant laquelle les jetons sont mis en jeu, en jours.
businessContext_i18n.es: El período durante el cual los tokens están apostados, en días.

inputs.label: Compounds per Year
inputs.businessContext: The number of times interest is compounded annually (e.g., 365 for daily, 12 for monthly, 1 for yearly).

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of times interest is compounded annually (e.g., 365 for daily, 12 for monthly, 1 for yearly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faizin yılda kaç kez bileşik olarak hesaplandığı (örneğin, günlük için 365, aylık için 12, yıllık için 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der jährlichen Zinseszinsungen (z. B. 365 für täglich, 12 für monatlich, 1 für jährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre de fois que les intérêts sont composés annuellement (ex. : 365 pour quotidien, 12 pour mensuel, 1 pour annuel).
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de veces que se capitaliza el interés anualmente (ej., 365 para diario, 12 para mensual, 1 para anual).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
